name: Au Gratin Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the carrots until crisp-tender; drain and set aside.
2. In a saucepan over medium heat, saut onion in 3 tablespoons butter until tender.
3. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper.
4. Gradually add milk; bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
5. Cook for 1 minute or until thickened. Stir in the cheese just until melted.
6. Add carrots and parsley.
7. Pour into a greased 8-inch square baking dish.
8. Melt remaining butter; add cornflakes.
9. Sprinkle over carrots.
10. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes or until bubbly.
Yield: 8-10 servings.
